title: Lean Compliance Rules IR
description: Validation schema for an intermediate representation (IR) of Lean ComplianceRule items prior to code generation.

namespace.description: Lean namespace that will contain the generated rules.

module_import.description: Lean module to import for Issuer and ComplianceRule definitions.

fields_used.description: Issuer field names referenced by the check/failReason.

check_hint.description: Natural-language hint for the Lean predicate (optional).

fail_reason_hint.description: Natural-language hint for the failure reason (optional).
